mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id AS orderId, order_item_id AS orderItemId, product_id AS productId, user_id AS userId, rating, content, images, reply, reply_time AS replyTime, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, deleted FROM t_review WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, order_id AS orderId, order_item_id AS orderItemId, product_id AS productId, user_id AS userId, rating, content, images, reply, reply_time AS replyTime, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, deleted FROM t_review WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
